# PingFederate Integrations

> AI agents should consult [Docs for Agents](https://developer.pingidentity.com/build-with-ai/docs-for-agents.md)
> for guidance on navigating Ping Identity documentation.

## ROOT

- [PingFederate and PingOne Integrations](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/index.md)

## Agentless

- [Agentless Integration Kit](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/agentless/pf_agentless_ik.md)
- [Agentless Integration Kit Changelog](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/agentless/release_notes/pf_agentless_ik_changelog.md)
- [Attribute drop-off process](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/agentless/custom_application_setup/pf_agentless_ik_attribute_drop_off_process.md)
- [Attribute formatting](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/agentless/custom_application_setup/pf_agentless_ik_attribute_formatting.md)
- [Attribute pickup process](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/agentless/custom_application_setup/pf_agentless_ik_attribute_pickup_process.md)
- [Authentication methods](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/agentless/custom_application_setup/pf_agentless_ik_authentication_methods.md)

- [Overview of the service provider SSO flow](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/agentless/pf_agentless_ik_overview_of_the_service_provider_sso_flow.md)

- [Reference ID IdP Adapter settings reference](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/agentless/custom_application_setup/pf_agentless_ik_reference_id_idp_adapter_settings_reference.md)

- [Sample application setup](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/agentless/sample_application_setup/pf_agentless_ik_sample_application_setup.md)
- [Sample application user accounts](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/agentless/sample_application_setup/pf_agentless_ik_sample_application_user_accounts.md)
- [Testing IdP-initiated SSO](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/agentless/sample_application_setup/pf_agentless_ik_testing_idp_initiated_sso.md)

## Akamai

- [Akamai Account Protector IdP Adapter settings reference](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/akamai/setup/pf-akamai-p7-adapter-settings-ref.md): Descriptions of standard and advanced fields that you can configure for the Akamai Account Protector IdP Adapter.
- [Akamai Account Protector Integration Kit](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/akamai/pf-akamai-p1-homepage.md): Overview of the components, requirements, and benefits of integrating the Akamai Account Protector Integration Kit with PingFederate.
- [Configuring an adapter instance](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/akamai/setup/pf-akamai-p6-configuring-an-adapter-instance.md): Learn how to create an Akamai Account Protector IdP Adapter instance.
- [Deploying the integration files](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/akamai/setup/pf-akamai-p5-deploying-the-integration-files.md): Download the Akamai Account Protector Integration Kit [.filepath]``.zip`` file and deploy it to your PingFederate directory.
- [Enabling debug logging](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/akamai/troubleshooting/pf-akamai-p9-enabling-debug-logging.md): Configure activity logging to troubleshoot how your Akamai Account Protector IdP Adapter instance integrates with PingFederate.
- [Overview of the SSO flow](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/akamai/pf-akamai-p2-sso-flow-overview.md): Description of the SSO flow when using the Akamai Account Protector Integration Kit.
- [Release notes](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/akamai/pf-akamai-p3-rn.md): Release notes for the Akamai Account Protector Integration Kit.
- [Setup](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/akamai/setup/pf-akamai-p4-setup.md): Setup tasks for the Akamai Account Protector Integration Kit.
- [Using risk score in the PingFederate authentication policy](https://docs.pingidentity.com/integrations/akamai/setup/pf-akamai-p8-using-score.md): Guidance on how to configure a branching PingFederate authentication policy based on an assigned risk score.
